title: Rei Asuka SHOUJO AI
wikitext:
[]: Rei/Asuka SHOUJO-AI             Quote Post by ninetyninenails » Sun Sep 24, 2006 12:11 am Well I made this to talk about the possibility of Rei/Asuka Shoujo-ai

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Sep 24, 2006 12:50 am Eva Hentai Posting Eva Hentai, or telling people where to find Eva Hentai is not allowed under any circumstances.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sun Sep 24, 2006 4:17 am MaggotMaster wrote: Eva Hentai Posting Eva Hentai, or telling people where to find Eva Hentai is not allowed under any circumstances.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 24, 2006 5:42 am We probably need to adopt a strict formulation, which sort-of accords with Anglophone fanspeak, that shoujo-ai is girl/girl romance (the sort of level that gets on TV like Marimite, Kasimasi or perhaps Strawberry Panic - though that gets a bit lime-flavoured at times). When it gets into the bedroom, i.e. Lemon + shoujo-ai, we can call it yuri and say it falls under the "keep it clean, guys" intent of the no hentai rule. Personally, I don't get even a bi-curious vibe from Asuka (she just wants Kaji to "J-j-jam it in!"), but I have read a couple of not-too-OOC fics that overcame suspension of disbelief in the A/S pairing. One is a lemon, in which Asuka, rather than Shinji, delivers Rei's new ID card, and she gets molested with the calculated intent of "You must learn to let go, Pilot Soryu, else , you will never be able to pilot your EVA as efficiently as possible." The other, just shoujo-ai, has the two of them fall into a weird co-dependency, where Rei feeds Asuka's need to be adored, and the adoration feeds Rei's need for purpose. Otherwise, I find Asuka/Hikari and /Maya more plausible.

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Sun Sep 24, 2006 5:57 am The only vaguely homosexual vibes I ever got from Asuka was that sleepover scene with Hikari. And Instrumentality with Maya & Ritsuko.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sun Sep 24, 2006 6:26 am Mr. Tines wrote: One is a lemon, in which Asuka, rather than Shinji, delivers Rei's new ID card, and she gets molested with the calculated intent of "You must learn to let go, Pilot Soryu, else , you will never be able to pilot your EVA as efficiently as possible." The other, just shoujo-ai, has the two of them fall into a weird co-dependency, where Rei feeds Asuka's need to be adored, and the adoration feeds Rei's need for purpose.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 24, 2006 7:07 am @jcmoorehead Those were The Visitor , by Evil Eric, and No Words by Landgren, and if that sort of thing is relevant to your interests, you'll have found the site already. @PilotIkari Asuka/Hikari really requires a bit of Tom Lehrer - 'Smut' wrote: All books can be indecent books Though recent books are bolder, For filth (I'm glad to say) is in the mind of the beholder. When correctly viewed, Everything is lewd.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Sep 24, 2006 7:35 am Mr. Tines wrote: Ep 23 - LTP wrote: Asuka: Hikari, let's go to bed. Hikari: Yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 24, 2006 8:02 am master0rolando wrote: oh...i thought it was supposed to seem suggestive...

[]:             Quote Post by ninetyninenails » Sun Sep 24, 2006 11:38 am lol I paired Asuka up with Hikari in my current fanfic

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Sep 24, 2006 8:33 pm You quoted Tom Lehrer. I love you.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Sep 24, 2006 8:36 pm Rei and Asuka are probably the last female characters ont he show who would ever shojo ai each other. If you list any other female characters on the show there's a better chance of them getting it on then Asuka and Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 25, 2006 12:29 am Defectron wrote: Rei and Asuka are probably the last female characters ont he show who would ever shojo ai each other. If you list any other female characters on the show there's a better chance of them getting it on then Asuka and Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Sep 25, 2006 12:32 am Reichu wrote: ... Misato + Kaworu ... Leliel + Armisael EVA-00 + EVA-03

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 25, 2006 12:48 am Reichu wrote: EVA-00 + EVA-03

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 25, 2006 1:37 am Mr. Tines wrote: As opposed to EVA-00 + EVA-04, eh.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Mon Sep 25, 2006 9:58 am Reichu wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: As opposed to EVA-00 + EVA-04, eh.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 25, 2006 11:46 am But we're doing female-only pairs, M. What are you implying...?

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Mon Sep 25, 2006 12:11 pm Eva-00/Eva-03, eh? Where's that screenshot when we need it...

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Sep 25, 2006 1:40 pm Naoko + Yui Yui + Rei Kyoko + Asuka Ritsuko + Naoko (+ Rei) Misato + Kaworu Frau-Doktor + Kyoko Random Bridge Bunny + The Secretary Leliel + Armisael EVA-00 + EVA-03
